name: jsonresume-theme-claude
description: A JSON Resume theme designed and built entirely by Claude Code in the terminal

scripts.render: node -e "import {readFile,writeFile} from 'fs/promises'; import {render} from './index.js'; writeFile('resume.html', render(JSON.parse(await readFile('resume.json','utf-8'))));"

author: Roland Sharp <rolandnsharp@gmail.com>
